title: Booking.com and AWS Skills Guild | Amazon Web Services
description:
Learn how Booking.com has partnered with AWS Skills Guild to create on-demand self paced cloud learning experiences, and help get more workloads into the cloud, through their b.cloudy program. 
 
Guild is a skills transformation program developed for select, large enterprises who are undergoing a business-wide digital transformation and need to up-skill their workforce to drive adoption of cloud.
 
Guild's programmatic approach helps accelerate cloud outcomes by creating excitement, increasing employee engagement, and nurturing a culture of learning within an organization.

Learn more at: https://go.aws/3l6aPEm

ABOUT AWS
Amazon Web Services (AWS) is the world’s most comprehensive and broadly adopted cloud platform, offering over 200 fully featured services from data centers globally. Millions of customers — including the fastest-growing startups, largest enterprises, and leading government agencies — are using AWS to lower costs, become more agile, and innovate faster.

#AWS #AmazonWebServices #CloudComputing #AWSSkillsGuild

title: Accelerate your RISE journey with AWS and Lemongrass | Amazon Web Services
description:
AWS and Lemongrass talk about the challenges that customers are facing with RISE adoption, advantages of running RISE on AWS and RISE advisory services by Lemongrass on AWS.

 SAP Saphire press release - https://lemongrasscloud.com/press-release/launches-rise-with-sap-advisory-services/

Recent Lemongrass Blog on How to Reduce Risk and Improve Outcomes When Deploying RISE with SAP - https://lemongrasscloud.com/articles/deploying-rise-with-sap-to-migrate-to-sap-s-4hana/

RISE Services certification Press Release from SAP - https://lemongrasscloud.com/press-release/lemongrass-qualified-to-support-rise-with-sap/
